title: Basis Risk: Which of the following best describes the concept of basis...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: Which of the following best describes the concept of basis risk in hedging?

options.text: Basis risk refers to the risk that the difference between the spot price and

solution: Basis risk refers to the risk that the difference between the spot price and the futures price may change. This can affect the effectiveness of a hedge, especially when hedging with futures contracts that may not perfectly correlate with the underlying asset's price movement.
